localizations.title: Pandemic
localizations.hint_1_first: First, you must find a blood sample infected with the yellow variant, then analyze it.
localizations.hint_1: Atlanta is a city infected with the yellow variant. Take a blood sample there. Then, determine the yellow virus' characteristics using the microscope (88) and the Virus Classification (1).
localizations.hint_2_first: A magnificent cup sits on top of the safe. This piece of art probably comes from one of Cook's archaeological digs.
localizations.hint_2: This cup is also on the picture of the archeaological site (75). Cook must regard it as a valuable object in some way.
localizations.hint_3: Cook's state is worrisome, and none of the cures seem to work. You are probably dealing with a new variant…
localizations.hint_4: Once cured, the research scientist manager (26) will give you the sequencer you need.
localizations.hint_5: These radar echoes indicate that Cook is now in a city located 3 aerial connections from Atlanta, Khartoum, and Delhi. Only one city fulfills that condition. It is a blue one.
localizations.hint_6: E.S.S.E.N. is not only the name of a city, but a series of directions that you need to follow to find Graham Cook.
localizations.hint_11: Again, apply the protocol (card 87) to inoculate the red cure.
localizations.hint_12_first: You first must find a blood sample of the yellow variant and analyze it.
localizations.hint_12: Atlanta is a city infected with the yellow variant. Take a blood sample there. Then, determine the yellow virus classification using the microscope (88) and the Virus Classification (1).
localizations.hint_13_first: Cook's notes (19) read that he was able to open the disk after completing the Maya story. Cook translated the story's glyphs. But, despite a literal translation, there is a general meaning you must perceive. Follow the logical sequence made of three words, i.e., three glyphs, to bring this story to a conclusion.
localizations.hint_13: Under a dark sky, a boar eats fruits and drinks water. A jaguar, walking in the jungle, smells, hears, and sees this boar. It then discreetly climbs up the tree near the river and, after a moment of silence… Come to the only conclusion possible using three words, i.e., three glyphs that are in this story.
localizations.hint_15: You already know the distance of Cook's jet flight. So what is the non-infected city located at that distance from Miami?
localizations.hint_16: If you are looking for Cook, maybe the soldier guarding the emergency unit could help you track him down. What could you give to have him start the search for patient 0?
localizations.hint_19_first: Cook's notes (19) read that he was able to open the disk after completing the Maya story. Cook translated the story's glyphs. But, despite a literal translation, there is a general meaning you must perceive. Follow the logical sequence made of three words, i.e., three glyphs, to bring this story to a conclusion.
localizations.hint_19: Under a huge dark sky, a boar eats fruit and drinks water. A jaguar, walking in the jungle, smells, hears, and sees this boar. It then discreetly climbs up the tree near the river and, after a moment of silence… Come up with the only possible conclusion using three words, i.e., three glyphs in this story.
localizations.hint_20: One of your team members will give you the protocol for the cure inoculation.
localizations.hint_22: The sick in this emergency unit have the yellow variant in their blood.
localizations.hint_23: You must learn more about the nature of this chemical compound.
localizations.hint_26: The research scientist manager is feverish and has a nose bleed. He could be a carrier of one of the variants. Study his case.
localizations.hint_33: One of your team members has the required skills to complete the construction works.
localizations.hint_35_first: Observe this new coverslip under a microscope (88). You are indeed dealing with a new variant whose specificity is its purple color.
localizations.hint_35: Purple is a mix of blue and red.
localizations.hint_37: You need to set up a suitable cure dissemination to cover the territory of each of the continents. To do so, use the game components from the box bottom. Then, place them correctly on each of the continents (one at a time), covering the areas formed by the connections between cities.
localizations.hint_41: After identifying the 6 cities patient 0 infected, you will find the only city with no direct connection with any of them to build the research station. It is a blue city.
localizations.hint_42: There is nothing you can do with this part of the formula until you get Cook's blood work. However, once you have it (77), superimpose the two parts of the formula to create a match between the common molecular structure (in purple) and the oxygen atom (O purple).
localizations.hint_45: You've come all this way in Cook's footsteps, but it's actually his blood that interests you for developing the blue variant cure.
localizations.hint_48: Zoom in to the maximum to be able to guess the DNA. To extract the DNA information, you need to use an "infrared light filter." You have an item that allows you to filter red light.
localizations.hint_54: After building the research station, you will find the required equipment to study the type of virus you are dealing with.
localizations.hint_58: Place this coverslip under your microscope (88). Make sure you take notice of the layout of the unidentified spikes (the small dark blue ones).
localizations.hint_59: When you find the substance that may have potentially caused the disease, you'll be able to study it with a mass spectrometer.
localizations.hint_60: The only lead you have on patient zero is the plane tickets from his last trip.
localizations.hint_66: Take the quarantine map and literally fly over Hong Kong.
localizations.hint_67: All it takes is to bring him the yellow cure once designed.
localizations.hint_68: In addition to inoculating this remedy according to protocol (87), remember where the sample of the blue variant came from.
localizations.hint_75_first: This picture shows an area of archeological digs. Some of the objects there must have been invaluable. However, one object, in particular, catches your attention.
localizations.hint_75: The red cup in the dig area is the same as the one sitting on top of the safe (2). Cook must regard it as a valuable object in some way.
localizations.hint_77: There is nothing you can do with this part of the formula until you have analyzed the powder that infected Cook. Once you have it (42), superimpose the two parts of the formula to create a match between the common molecular structure (in purple) and the oxygen atom (O purple).
localizations.hint_79: You have in your test tube a little of each of the blue and red cures. Now, you have to mix them to obtain a purple solution. A few shakes should suffice!
localizations.hint_80: You learn from the letter (95) that Cook has left London on a boat. This strip of paper (80) indicates his itinerary from London.
localizations.hint_82: The spectrometric analysis of the white powder (82) shows 2 molecules. The elements of each of these molecules are also in the periodic table of chemical elements (10). Therefore, each molecule provides a number.
localizations.hint_84: This crumbled piece of paper seems to show Cook's next stopover. One of the route's extremities must stand for Hong Kong.
localizations.hint_87_first: The inoculation protocol indicates which city is to receive the cure. That city must be located between two that are contaminated, but which ones?
localizations.hint_87: A cure must be inoculated in a city located precisely between two infected cities with a variant of the same color as the said cure.
localizations.hint_88: This microscope will be useful for observing the various blood samples for each of the variants.
localizations.hint_92: Each of your team members has a segment of Cook's route.
localizations.hint_93_first: You must apply protocol (87) one last time to determine where the purple cure is to be inoculated. But this time around, there is no infected city of a purple color. However, you have discovered that the purple variant is a mix of blue and red variants.
localizations.hint_93: You must inoculate the purple cure in a city connected to two infected cities: one red AND one blue.
localizations.hint_94: To design the cure for the red variant, you need blood samples from the sick located in one of the cities infected with the red variant.
localizations.answer_hint_1:
Once you have the blood sample from Atlanta (54), observe it under the microscope (88) and sweep your device over it. Determine the virus characteristics (XY) using the Virus Classification (1): the spikes are yellow (X=1) and the shape is triangular (Y=4).
Give this information (+14) to the research scientist manager (12).
localizations.answer_hint_2: The cup coordinates (10 and 16) in the dig area provide the code of the safe (2). The sequence comes from the color rectangles on the safe's door: yellow at the top and purple at the bottom. Enter 1016 on the safe to open it.
localizations.answer_hint_3: To ascertain that Cook (3) did get infected with a new variant, have the scientist (32) take a blood sample.
localizations.answer_hint_4: If you haven't done so yet, treat the research scientist manager (26) with the blue cure (68). You then get the DNA sequencer (70). Next, open the sequencer to scan the DNA of the red virus.
localizations.answer_hint_5: Only Essen is located three connections from Atlanta, Khartoum, and Delhi. Use the dedicated button to get to Essen.
localizations.answer_hint_6:
ESSEN also means: East / South / South / East / North.
If you follow these indications from Essen, you will find a well-hidden +39. Take the car (6) to get there quickly.
localizations.answer_hint_11: The red variant must be inoculated between the cities infected with the red variant (Hong Kong and Delhi). Use the dedicated button to get to Kolkota. Then, use your device to scan the QR code on the red cure to inoculate it.
localizations.answer_hint_12:
Once you have the blood sample from Atlanta (54), observe it under the microscope (88) and sweep your device over it. Determine the virus characteristics (XY) using the Virus Classification (1): the spikes are yellow (X=1) and the shape is triangular (Y=4).
Give this information (+14) to the research scientist manager (12).
localizations.answer_hint_13: The text probably continues with the JAGUAR EATING the BOAR. Spot the three corresponding glyphs and enter them in the correct order in the Maya disk to open it.
localizations.answer_hint_15: Superimpose the flight distance (15) onto the quarantine map. Place the lower left side on Miami and rotate the card. You can see that only two cities are located at that distance: Istanbul and Khartoum. The airports of the infected cities are closed, so Cook could only go to Istanbul. Use the dedicated button to get there.
localizations.answer_hint_16: Give Graham Cook's picture (50) to the soldier (16) so that he can launch the search for Cook in Hong Kong.
localizations.answer_hint_19: The text probably continues with the JAGUAR EATING the BOAR. Spot the three corresponding glyphs and enter them in the correct order in the Maya disk to open it.
localizations.answer_hint_20: Now that the yellow cure (20) has been designed, alert the medic (67) to get the inoculation protocol.
localizations.answer_hint_22: Since you are in Atlanta (22), ask the scientist (32) to take a blood sample from one of the sick in the emergency unit.
localizations.answer_hint_23: Use the mass spectrometer (59) from the research station to analyze this mysterious white powder (23).
localizations.answer_hint_26: Have the scientist (32) take a blood sample from the research scientist manager (26).
localizations.answer_hint_33: Have the operations expert (41) finalize the construction works of the research station (33).
localizations.answer_hint_35: The cure for the purple variant could very well be a mix of the blue (68), and red (11) cures. Try mixing them.
localizations.answer_hint_37:
If you place the game components on all three continents correctly, you can see:
on the Americas (yellow variant), number 5; Europe and Africa (blue variant), number 2; and Asia and Oceania (red variant), number 8. Enter protocol 528.
localizations.answer_hint_41: The only city that has no direct connection with the six infected cities is St. Petersburg. Use the dedicated button to get there.
localizations.answer_hint_42: Do not read this solution unless you have revealed card 77. Place Cook's blood molecule (77) on top of the powder molecule (42) to create a match between both purple elements (the line and the O), you can see number 68.
localizations.answer_hint_45: Have the scientist (32) take a blood sample from Graham Cook (45) to design the cure for the blue variant.
localizations.answer_hint_48: After zooming in to the maximum on this virus' spike, use one of the cubes and sweep it directly above your device. You can then make out a 4 among the DNA fragments.
localizations.answer_hint_58: If you zoom in slowly on the coverslip with this microscope (88), you will see that the unknown spikes form the number 60.
localizations.answer_hint_60: Thanks to the dates, you can put the plane tickets back in chronological order: KTM>DEL>HKG>LMA>ATL>LDN. So, his last known position is in London. Use the dedicated button to get there.
localizations.answer_hint_66: If you stand over the quarantine map, you can see through the cube placed on Hong Kong a +18. Get there by helicopter (66).
localizations.answer_hint_68: The blue cure must be inoculated between the cities infected with the blue variant (London and Khartoum). Use the dedicated button to go to Algiers and scan the QR code with your device. Also, remember that the research scientist manager (26) was also infected with the blue variant. So, treat him with the blue cure (68).
localizations.answer_hint_75: The cup coordinates (10 and 16) in the dig area provide the code of the safe (2). The sequence comes from the color rectangles on the safe's door: yellow at the top and purple at the bottom. Enter 1016 on the safe to open it.
localizations.answer_hint_77: Do not read this solution unless you have revealed card 42. Place Cook's blood molecule (77) on top of the powder molecule (42) to create a match between both purple elements (the line and the O), you can see number 68.
localizations.answer_hint_79: To mix both cures, shake your device from top to bottom and vice-versa.
localizations.answer_hint_80: Go from London, count 4 spaces to the west, 16 to the south, 20 to the east, 3 to the north, 8 to the east, 3 to the north, then 1 to the west. This route leads you to Hong Kong. So, use the dedicated button to get there and try finding Cook.
localizations.answer_hint_82: Transfer the elements of each of the molecules onto the periodic table of chemical elements (10). Elements H, K, Ti, and Rf of molecule 1 form a 4. Elements C, F, Br, and Ts of molecule 2 form a 2.
localizations.answer_hint_84: If you orient the piece of paper correctly and start at Hong Kong, the route goes through Ho Chi Minh, then Jakarta, Sydney, Lima, Santiago, Buenos Aires, Bogotá, and finally, Miami. Use the dedicated button to get there.
localizations.answer_hint_87:
The yellow cure must be inoculated between the cities infected with the yellow variant (Atlanta and Lima). Use the dedicated button to get to Mexico City.

Scan the QR code with your device to inoculate the yellow cure.
localizations.answer_hint_90: It is in Cook's blood (3) that you found the purple variant. Don't waste any time and give him an injection of the purple cure (90).
localizations.answer_hint_92: The plane tickets reproduced on your characters' back provide the 6 cities that Graham Cook, patient zero, visited and infected. If you haven't done so yet, place 1 cube on each of these six cities: Atlanta, Lima, London, Khartoum, Delhi, and Hong Kong.
localizations.answer_hint_93: Only Riyadh is directly connected to a city infected with the blue variant (Khartoum) AND a city infected with the red variant (Delhi). Use the dedicated button to get there and scan the QR code on the purple cure (90) with your device.
localizations.answer_hint_94: You saw the emergency unit (16) in Hong Kong, a city infected with the red variant, during your search for patient zero. Have the scientist (32) take blood samples from all the sick there.
localizations.machine_2: You have the correct code, and open the safe carefully…
localizations.machine_13: You hear a few clicks coming from inside the Maya disk. Then, after a brief moment of silence, the middle part of the disk unclips...
localizations.machine_37: You managed to set up your cure dissemination protocol successfully. Thanks to your team's skills, the pandemic is totally under control. After a few weeks, the disease is eradicated. You saved humanity. Great job!
localizations.machine_70: After handling a few times the red variant's DNA, you manage to design a cure.
localizations.machine_79: After a click of the wrist, you get a homogeneous purple mix.
localizations.city_st_petersburg: You take a seat on board your first flight to St. Petersburg. After a few hours, you arrive at the construction site of the research station.
localizations.city_london: You go to london and head for Graham Cook's apartment.
localizations.city_hong_kong: Without further ado, you go after Graham Cook, patient zero, embarking on the first flight for Hong Kong.
localizations.city_hong_miami: You go to Miami in an attempt to catch up with Graham Cook.
localizations.city_hong_istanbul: The track for patient zero continues, heading to Istanbul.
localizations.city_hong_essen: Hoping to get hold of Graham Cook, you fly over to Essen.
localizations.city_mexico: The yellow cure was inoculated—immune data: analysis in progress. You can continue.
localizations.city_algiers: The blue cure was inoculated—immune data: analysis in progress. You can continue.
localizations.city_kolkata: While the three cures for the three disease variants have been inoculated, you learn that Graham Cook's condition is rapidly deteriorating despite being hospitalized.
localizations.city_riyadh: Great job! Your responsiveness slowed down the spread of the purple variant—you are reaching your goal.
localizations.machine_70_download_yellow: You retrieve the immune data of the yellow cure.
localizations.machine_70_download_blue: You retrieve the immune data of the blue cure.
localizations.medic_instructions_1: Freely select a city infected in each color.
localizations.medic_instructions_2: You must again contain the disease in the same three cities as previously and the same order.
localizations.medic_instructions_3: You must contain the disease in the other three cities according to the following order: blue, yellow, then red.
localizations.medic_instructions_4: You must contain the disease in the six infected cities in the same order as previously.
localizations.medic_instructions_5: You must contain the disease in the six infected cities but in reverse order.
localizations.medic_error_start: This is an error. Please, select a city per color.
localizations.medic_error:
This is an error. You had to contain the disease as follows: {0}.
You gain no time.
localizations.medic_success: Our teams manage to slow down the spread; you gain time.
localizations.machine_70_data_hint: To get all the immune data, you should have inoculated the yellow cure (20) and the blue cure (68) according to the inoculation protocol (87) the medic (67) gave you.
localizations.machine_70_data_answer: To inoculate the yellow cure, use the dedicated button to get to Mexico City. Then, scan the yellow cure QR code (20). To inoculate the blue cure, use the dedicated button to get to Algiers. Then, scan the QR code on the blue cure (68).
localizations.machine_70_dna_hint: Rectify the DNA anomalies to obtain the red cure. Each base is, in fact, a logical sequence to complete. Once you find the correct pattern, use the blue and yellow antibodies (27 and 28) to determine the correct three-letter sequence.
localizations.machine_70_dna_answer:
1st anomaly: The missing link is the one with a polka dot texture. According to the yellow antibody (27), this link is formed with the proteins T (Thymine), G (Guanine), and T (Thymine). So, enter TGT in the app, then confirm.
2nd anomaly: The missing link is the one without texture. The blue antibody (28) indicates that it is a texture formed from AAA proteins. Enter AAA, then confirm.
3rd anomaly: It is a symmetry. The center is the link to the checkerboard texture. Therefore, the missing link is the one with the bias stripe texture. These are the GCT proteins. Enter GCT, then confirm.
localizations.machine_37_intro: Now, take the game components from the bottom of the box. They will be useful in determining the protocol for each of the continents.
localizations.cure_scanner_instructions: Which cure do you want to inoculate?
localizations.city_none: You have nothing to do for the time being.
localizations.machine_88_early_red: All teams are currently busy developing the blue cure. You will design the red variant later on.
localizations.machine_88_red_zoom4: We should use the infrared filter.
